query:
UPDATE business_plans SET
  missionStatement = 'To transform employees into independent business owners through comprehensive training, legal entity formation, and ongoing support - creating a sustainable pathway from workforce to working for self.',
  visionStatement = 'Create a sustainable ecosystem where employees develop into independent business owners, contributing to multi-generational wealth building while maintaining connection to the L.A.W.S. community.',
  organizationDescription = 'The only workforce development program that legally and compliantly transitions W-2 employees to 1099 contractors and independent business owners through structured training, entity formation support, and ongoing business tools - creating generational wealth through entrepreneurship. Technology Focus: A comprehensive SaaS platform that provides business management tools, financial tracking, document generation, and compliance verification for transitioning contractors and small businesses.',
  yearFounded = 2024,
  productsServices = 'Workforce-to-Ownership Transition Program, L.A.W.S. Business Management Platform (SaaS Technology), AI-Powered Business Development Tools, Grant Writing & Funding Acquisition Services, Financial Literacy & Contractor Training Programs',
  uniqueValueProposition = 'The only workforce development program that legally and compliantly transitions W-2 employees to 1099 contractors and independent business owners through structured training, entity formation support, and ongoing business tools - creating generational wealth through entrepreneurship.',
  targetMarket = 'W-2 employees seeking transition to independent contractors and business owners; underserved communities lacking access to business development resources',
  marketSize = '$50B+ workforce development market',
  competitiveAdvantage = 'Only program combining legal compliance, technology platform, and community support for workforce-to-ownership transition',
  teamSize = 6,
  teamDescription = 'Family-based leadership team with expertise in business development, education, and community organizing',
  fundingNeeded = 500000,
  fundingPurpose = 'Platform development, contractor training program expansion, and community outreach',
  socialImpact = 'Transform employees into independent business owners, creating generational wealth in underserved communities',
  communityBenefit = '50+ new businesses created within 5 years; 100+ contractors successfully transitioned',
  shortTermGoals = '[{"goal":"Launch contractor transition program","timeline":"Q1 2026"},{"goal":"Complete SaaS platform MVP","timeline":"Q2 2026"},{"goal":"Transition first cohort of 10 contractors","timeline":"Q3 2026"}]',
  longTermGoals = '[{"goal":"Create 50+ new businesses","timeline":"5 years"},{"goal":"Achieve $1M annual platform revenue","timeline":"3 years"},{"goal":"Expand to 5 states","timeline":"5 years"}]',
  milestones = '[{"milestone":"Platform Beta Launch","targetDate":"2026-03-01"},{"milestone":"First Contractor Cohort","targetDate":"2026-06-01"},{"milestone":"SBIR Phase I Application","targetDate":"2026-09-01"}]',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE entityName = 'The L.A.W.S. Collective, LLC';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute UPDATE business_plans SET
  missionStatement = 'To transform employees into independent business owners through comprehensive training, legal entity formation, and ongoing support - creating a sustainable pathway from workforce to working for self.',
  visionStatement = 'Create a sustainable ecosystem where employees develop into independent business owners, contributing to multi-generational wealth building while maintaining connection to the L.A.W.S. community.',

Technology Focus: A comprehensive SaaS platform that provides business management tools, financial tracking, document generation, and compliance verification for transitioning contractors and small businesses.',

  productsServices = 'Workforce-to-Ownership Transition Program, L.A.W.S. Business Management Platform (SaaS Technology), AI-Powered Business Development Tools, Grant Writing & Funding Acquisition Services, Financial Literacy & Contractor Training Programs',
  uniqueValueProposition = 'The only workforce development program that legally and compliantly transitions W-2 employees to 1099 contractors and independent business owners through structured training, entity formation support, and ongoing business tools - creating generational wealth through entrepreneurship.',
  targetMarket = 'W-2 employees seeking transition to independent contractors and business owners; underserved communities lacking access to business development resources',

  competitiveAdvantage = 'Only program combining legal compliance, technology platform, and community support for workforce-to-ownership transition',
  teamSize = 6,

  fundingNeeded = 500000,

  shortTermGoals = '[{"goal":"Launch contractor transition program","timeline":"Q1 2026"},{"goal":"Complete SaaS platform MVP","timeline":"Q2 2026"},{"goal":"Transition first cohort of 10 contractors","timeline":"Q3 2026"}]',
  longTermGoals = '[{"goal":"Create 50+ new businesses","timeline":"5 years"},{"goal":"Achieve $1M annual platform revenue","timeline":"3 years"},{"goal":"Expand to 5 states","timeline":"5 years"}]',
  milestones = '[{"milestone":"Platform Beta Launch","targetDate":"2026-03-01"},{"milestone":"First Contractor Cohort","targetDate":"2026-06-01"},{"milestone":"SBIR Phase I Application","targetDate":"2026-09-01"}]',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE entityName = 'The L.A.W.S. Collective, LLC';
